formItem.nameEn: Assigned Code Form for spare parts
formItem.viewsRead: ITEM_FORM Get All Basic Item Form, STORES_ERP Get All Basic Erp Stores, BRANCH_ERP Get All Basic Erp Branch,

formItem.descEn: Determine Foundation Specification for External Transactions
formItem.tableRead: STOR_TRNS get all transactions from ERP, SPECS_OUT_TRNS get all specsOutTrns,
formItem.tableWrite: SPECS_OUT_TRNS update if yes else insert,

formItem.tableRead: ISSUE get issue by issue id, UNIT_SCHEDULE, EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG get configure schedule by SCHEDULE_ID, USED_SPARE_PARTS get Used Item schedule by SCHEDULE_ID, QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE get special item, ISSUE_TASKS,
formItem.viewsRead: SPARE_PARTS get spare parts by subcode or name by not in item code by item form,
formItem.tableWrite: ISSUE update total cost, TRANSACTION insert transaction, USED_SPARE_PARTS insert Used Parts from tasks,

formItem.viewsRead: TRANS_STORE_ITEM get response total store items, RESULT_STORE_ITEM get Result Total Store Items,
formItem.tableWrite: TRANSACTION insert transaction, TRANSACTION_DETAILS insert transaction details, TRANSACTION_STATUS insert transaction first status, Transaction update transaction, STORE_TRNS_M ERP save transaction in ERP, STORE_TRNS_O ERP save transaction details in ERP,

formItem.tableRead: QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE get item by SCHEDULE_ID, UNIT_SCHEDULE, SCHEDULE, EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG get configure schedule by SCHEDULE_ID, TRANSACTION get check response,
formItem.viewsRead: TRANS_STORE_ITEM get response total store items, RESULT_STORE_ITEM get Result Total Store Items,
formItem.tableWrite: TRANSACTION insert transaction, TRANSACTION_DETAILS insert transaction details, TRANSACTION_STATUS insert transaction first status, Transaction update transaction, STORE_TRNS_M ERP save transaction in ERP, STORE_TRNS_O ERP save transaction details in ERP,

formItem.tableRead:
ISSUE get issue by issue id, QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE get item by SCHEDULE_ID, UNIT_SCHEDULE, EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG get configure schedule by SCHEDULE_ID, USER_STORE get uesr store by user id, ITEM_FORM_LIST get item form list by store code, ATTACHED_EQPS get attached eqps by MAIN_EQUIP_ID and separation_DATE is null"
SPARE_PARTS (popup window) get spare parts,
formItem.tableWrite: QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE delete by SCHEDULE_ID AND IS_DIRECT_PRCH, ISSUE update TOTAL_COST by UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID, QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE insert quantified from tasks, RECONFIG_TASK delete form reconfig task by ISSUE_ID, UNIT_SCHEDULE update CONFIGURE to yes by ID,

formItem.tableRead: ISSUE get issue by id, TRANSACTION get check response,
formItem.viewsRead: RESULT_STORE_ITEM get Result Total Store Items, TRANS_STORE_ITEM get response total store items,

formItem.tableRead: MAINTAINABLE_UNIT to get updatable units, AVERAGE_UNIT to get equipment counter info, SCHEDULE to get equipment schedules, UNIT_SCHEDULE_HISTORY for the process,
MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE to get main unit type ,
formItem.tableWrite: MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE save the new main type ,
formItem.jspTag: TYPE CATEGORY to get the category of the main unit type, COUNTER UNIT to get the units ,

formItem.tableRead: MAINTAINABLE_UNIT to get all units, TASKS to get task id and task name ,
formItem.viewsRead: ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO to get information about the spare parts about specific unit ,
formItem.queryString: "select count(task_id),tasks.task_name from ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO inner join tasks on ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO.TASK_ID = tasks.ID where unit_id=? and EXPECTED_B_DATE between to_date(?,'yyyy/MM/dd') and to_date(?,'yyyy/MM/dd') and task_id is not null group by task_id , tasks.task_name "

formItem.tableRead: MAINTAINABLE_UNIT to get all units by pagination, SCHEDULE_RELATIONS get all related schedules by schedule id,
formItem.viewsRead: RELATED_SCHEDULE_DETAILS get details for related schedules ,
formItem.queryString: "select count(task_id),tasks.task_name from ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO inner join tasks on ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO.TASK_ID = tasks.ID where unit_id=? and EXPECTED_B_DATE between to_date(?,'yyyy/MM/dd') and to_date(?,'yyyy/MM/dd') and task_id is not null group by task_id , tasks.task_name "

formItem.descEn: Job Order Labor Average Cost Report
formItem.tableRead: MAINTAINABLE_UNIT to get all units , All main types and all brands , PROJECT get all sites, TASKS get all maintenance item, QUANTIFIED_MNTENCE get all spare parts , TRADE get all trades ,
formItem.viewsRead: ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO to get information aobut the issue and it's tasks , ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE_ITEM_DATA to get information about the items such as price ,
formItem.jspTag: Maintenance TYPE, (Periodic , Emergency ,BOTH) to choose the maintenance type or , all maintenance type,
formItem.queryString:
IF UNIT radio button choosen : , ( , getByEquipTaskItemWithoutTitleStatus getByEquipTaskWithoutTitleStatus getByEquipItemWithoutTitleStatus getByEquipWithoutTitleStatus ) , _____________________________________________________________________
IF BRAND radio button choosen : , ( , getByBrandSiteTaskItemWithoutTitleStatus getByBrandSiteTaskWithoutTitleStatus getByBrandSiteItemWithoutTitleStatus getByBrandSiteWithoutTitleStatus ), ________________________________________________________________________________________
IF MAIN TYPE radio button choosen : , ( , getByTypeSiteTaskWithoutTitleStatus, getByTypeSiteItemWithoutTitleStatus, getByTypeSiteWithoutTitleStatus, ), _____________________________________________________________________________________
IF LABOR DETAILS choosen : , (, getItemsWithAvgPriceItemData , ), _____________________________________________________________________________________
IF LABOR DETAILS not choosen : , (, getItemsWithAvgPrice ),

formItem.nameAr: التحديث التلقائى للمعدة على حسب المعدلات
formItem.nameEn: Auto Update Equipment according to Average working Time
formItem.descAr: تحديث المعلومات حول الآلات واحدة معدات
formItem.tableRead: EQUIP_STATUS Get difference between End Date and begin Date for out of working equipment
formItem.viewsRead: EQUIP_BY_AUTO_UPDATE_READING To get ID for equipemnt , AVERAGE working Time CURRENT_READING , UNIT_NAME equipment Name,ENTRY_TIME Equipment working date after maintenance
formItem.tableWrite: Average_Unit update data for equipment Reading_Rate_Machine Insert New Reading of machine
formItem.jspTag: MetaDataMgr TYPE (Periodic , Emergency ,BOTH) to choose the Equipment type or all maintenance type ListOfEquip List that have all Data for equipment and use it to display,
